title: New Orleans; public belt railroad bonds and notes
doc_html:
§4533. Repealed by Acts 2020, No. 359, §6, see Act.

Added by Acts 1976, No. 245, §1; Acts 2020, No. 359, §6, see Act

            NOTE: See Acts 2020, No. 359, §§9 and 10 regarding effectiveness and applicability of cooperative endeavor agreement dated February 1, 2018.

§4533.  Repealed by Acts 2020, No. 359, §6, see Act.

NOTE:  See Acts 2020, No. 359, §§9 and 10 regarding effectiveness and applicability
of cooperative endeavor agreement dated February 1, 2018.
